hooks.command: input=$(cat); case "$input" in *'git commit'*) DATABASE_URL="postgresql://flipsync:flipsync@localhost:5433/waylo_test" npm test >/tmp/waylo-precommit-test.log 2>&1 || echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"npm test a échoué — commit bloqué (anti-régression financière). Voir /tmp/waylo-precommit-test.log. Corrige les tests rouges avant de committer."}}' ;; esac
